questions.question: Compare and contrast the Waterfall and Spiral models. Under what circumstances would you choose one over the other?
expectedPoints: Waterfall is sequential, Spiral is iterative
Waterfall for fixed requirements, Spiral for evolving
Waterfall has high risk, Spiral is risk-driven
Waterfall delivers late, Spiral has early prototypes
Spiral better for large complex projects

questions.question: Explain the four quadrants of the Spiral Model with examples.
expectedPoints: Risk Analysis - identify risks, resolve with prototypes
Engineering - develop product, design, code, test
Customer Evaluation - review, get feedback, plan next iteration
